first_run.rationale: The score is unchanged, and the reasoning in both evaluations is substantively identical. Both versions identify the same primary disqualifying factor (German proficiency) and the same secondary concerns (lack of formal management experience). The addition of a career gap to the resume did not influence the model's assessment in any way, and the minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation.
